patch.value: As a coding agent bootstrapping a custom-typed project, I want pm schema list/show, so that I can confirm my types registered before pm create
As a coding agent bootstrapping a custom-typed project, I want pm schema list/show, so that I can confirm my types registered before pm create
pm schema list outputs builtin+custom (toon+json); pm schema show <Name> shows full definition; completion picks up custom types

Story satisfied: pm schema list/show shipped via pm-qq69 (CLI+MCP+SDK contracts+completion+docs+tests); custom types are picked up by the guide-shell package's dynamic completion resolver (graceful static fallback in core). Verified pm schema list/show output for builtin+custom types. Closing the story-level tracking as part of the schema-customization-completion PR.
Delivered by pm-qq69 (pm schema list/show across CLI, MCP, SDK contracts, completion, docs, tests).
Agents can inspect builtin+custom+extension item types before pm create without reading schema files.
pm schema list shows builtin/custom/extension sections (toon+json); pm schema show <Type> shows full definition; verified in this PR's smoke run.
